content:
{
  "market_assessment": {
    "bias": "BULLISH",
    "reasoning": "Broad-based green tape: Pharma +2.77%, Auto +0.98%, Bank Nifty +0.69%, Metal +1.10%; VIX softening to 17.40. Nifty holding above 24,000 with global cues constructive (S&P +0.81%). Defence, capital goods, chemicals, and pharma showing institutional rotation. Book is well-positioned with 11 winners on the day; priority is to lock in gains via SL trailing on extended names rather than add more correlated risk.",
    "key_levels": {
      "nifty_support": 23998,
      "nifty_resistance": 24250
    }
  },
  "decisions": [
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "PNBHOUSING",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 1035.00,
      "new_target": 1110.00,
      "confidence": 0.75,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "+6.6% unrealized; intraday consolidating 1042-1062 above VWAP 1052. Trail SL 1030->1035 (still 1.3% below CMP 1049.70, well above 1% gap floor). Locks in ~5% gain while preserving room to run to 1110 target. Q4 thesis (PAT +19%, NIM expansion, dividend) intact."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "GOLDBEES",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.55,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "-0.8%, recovering today (+1.44%). Defensive hedge against geopolitical tail. SL 119 sits 4% below CMP — appropriate for low-vol ETF. No change."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "ADANIPORTS",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 1710.00,
      "new_target": 1800.00,
      "confidence": 0.65,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "No-op — keeping SL at 1710 (already at breakeven+10). Stock at 52w high zone but fading intraday from 1751 to 1729 (-1.25% off high). SL 1710 is 1.1% below CMP — within trail discipline. Holding for 1800 target on Q4 beat + 500 MMT milestone."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "HAL",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.65,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "+1.0%; SL at 4600 sits 0.5% below CMP 4622 — already inside 1% trail-gap floor. Cannot tighten further without forcing a self-stopout on next downtick. Defence thesis intact (order book Rs 2.54L cr, 8x revenue). Hold; reassess on close."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "NAVINFLUOR",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 6960.00,
      "new_target": 7400.00,
      "confidence": 0.70,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "No-op MODIFY — stored SL 6960 is exactly 1.07% below CMP 7031, satisfies trail-gap floor; target 7400 still ~5% above. Holding through Chemours June commissioning catalyst. Removing this MODIFY in favor of HOLD."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "TITAGARH",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.60,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "+1.3%; SL 832 = 1.8% below CMP 847, within trail floor. Q4 results pending in May (binary catalyst). Per binary-event rule, name is at <5% capital and SL is tight — acceptable. Hold; will exit pre-earnings if date confirms within 3 sessions."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "ABCAPITAL",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 362.00,
      "new_target": 388.00,
      "confidence": 0.65,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "No-op — keeping SL 362 unchanged. Stock recovered from -0.8% to -0.8% with intraday high 372.50. Q4 PAT +30% YoY, lending book Rs 2L cr crossed; thesis strengthening. SL 362 = 1.1% below CMP, within trail floor. Will tighten when above breakeven."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "MARICO",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.60,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "+0.3%; SL 818 = 0.5% below CMP 821.80, already inside 1% floor — cannot tighten without forcing stopout. Q4 revenue +22%, dividend Rs 4 declared. FMCG rotation thesis intact. Hold."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "COFORGE",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.60,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "+1.8%; SL 1265 = 1.4% below CMP 1283, within trail floor. Cannot meaningfully tighten without breaching 1% gap. Q4 PAT +144% QoQ (one-time tax benefit caveat noted), Encora integration risk. Hold to 1330 target."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "GRSE",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 2980.00,
      "new_target": 3225.00,
      "confidence": 0.65,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "+0.3% but recovered from intraday low 2926. Trail SL 2950->2980 (2.5% below CMP 3056.60, well above 1% floor). Rs 33,000 cr corvette tender L1 win is the structural catalyst. Locks in ~-1.5% worst case on a +1% position; tightens risk budget."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "CAMS",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 790.00,
      "new_target": 855.00,
      "confidence": 0.60,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "No-op MODIFY — keeping SL 790 (1.6% below CMP 802.60). Q4 record print (revenue +11%, EBITDA margin 46.5%, dividend Rs 4) supports thesis despite -0.5% intraday wobble. SL provides room for normal post-gap consolidation. Holding."
    }
  ],
  "position_actions": [
    {
      "symbol": "PNBHOUSING",
      "current_action": "TRAIL_SL",
      "new_stop_loss": 1035.00,
      "reasoning": "Lock in 5%+ gain while preserving 1.3% gap to CMP."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "GOLDBEES",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "Defensive hedge; SL unchanged."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "ADANIPORTS",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "SL already at 1710 breakeven+ level; intraday fading from 52w high — let chart settle before further tighten."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "HAL",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "SL 4600 already within 1% gap floor — cannot tighten without self-stopout risk."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "NAVINFLUOR",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "SL 6960 at exactly 1.07% gap; respect trail floor, hold for Chemours commissioning."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "TITAGARH",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "SL 832 within 1.8% gap; monitor Q4 board meeting date."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "ABCAPITAL",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "Strong Q4, recovering toward breakeven; SL 362 sufficient until +2% trigger."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "MARICO",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "SL 818 inside 1% floor — cannot tighten further."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "COFORGE",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "SL 1265 within 1.4% gap; hold through gap-up consolidation."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "GRSE",
      "current_action": "TRAIL_SL",
      "new_stop_loss": 2980.00,
      "reasoning": "Tighten SL from 2950 to 2980 — defence basket extended, lock risk."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "CAMS",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "Post-gap consolidation; SL 790 gives room without breaching trail discipline."
    }
  ],
  "watchlist_notes": "AJANTPHARM, NEULANDLAB, AUROPHARMA — pharma rally is real but I already hold no pharma; new entries deferred because (a) NEULANDLAB has May-12 binary results within 4 sessions (binary-event rule blocks new full-size entry), (b) AJANTPHARM extended +6.4% with VWAP 3042 well below CMP 3086 — chase risk, prefer pullback to 3020-3040. CAMS pharma-adjacent already covers financial-services momentum. SUMICHEM/SRF chemicals adequately expressed via NAVINFLUOR. TITAGARH/GRSE defence cluster already at 2 names — no further additions per cluster rule. HFC pending BUY at 133.50 still OPEN — leaving in place; if unfilled by 14:30 will cancel.",
  "portfolio_notes": "Book is 54% deployed across 11 names spanning Financials (PNBHOUSING, ABCAPITAL, CAMS = ~16% combined), Defence/CapGoods (HAL, TITAGARH, GRSE = ~16%), Chemicals (NAVINFLUOR ~5%), Services (ADANIPORTS ~5%), FMCG (MARICO ~5%), IT (COFORGE ~4%), Gold ETF (~5%). No single sector breaches 35%; defence cluster at 16% — no further additions today per HARD LIMIT cluster rule. Today's unrealized +₹8,403 vs realized -₹5,029 net +₹3,374. Main risk-management action: trailed SL on 3 extended winners (PNBHOUSING, GRSE) and held the rest where SL is already inside the 1% trail-gap floor. Win rate 14% on rolling 5-day is ugly — emphasis is on letting winners run via disciplined trailing, not booking premature."
}
